# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

api:
  enabled: true
  global_headers:
    Content-Security-Policy: "default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; object-src 'none'"
    Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload

routes:
  - name: /users-service
    upstream_url: http://users-service:8080
    paths:
      - /
    methods:
      - GET
      - POST

services:
  users-service:
    url: http://users-service:8080

plugins:
  - name: key-auth
    enabled: true
    config:
      key_in_header: X-Auth-Key
      key_required: true
